docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,689.00 FILED BY ELITE SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MIX CINDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIX CINDY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELITE SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIX CINDY $2,689.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,735.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MIX CINDY HEARING SET FOR OCT-11-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-11-1991, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-04-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-23-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-23-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-16-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELITE SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MIX CINDY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
